title: microrrhinum minus subsp. litorale
intro: Microrrhinum minus subsp. litorale, also known as dwarf sea thyme, is a low-growing, creeping perennial plant that belongs to the thyme family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and promoting relaxation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, dwarf sea thyme is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
